qa_pairs.question: What problem can arise when two or more parallel MATLAB jobs simultaneously call `parpool` when using a `Cluster` parallel environment?
qa_pairs.answer: When two or more parallel MATLAB jobs call `parpool` at the same time, they attempt to read and write to the same `.dat` file in the `$HOME/.matlab/local_cluster_jobs/R*` folder, which can corrupt the local parallel profile used by other MATLAB jobs.

qa_pairs.question: How can users resolve a corrupted local parallel profile in MATLAB caused by simultaneous `parpool` calls?
qa_pairs.answer: If a local parallel profile has been corrupted due to multiple parallel MATLAB jobs calling `parpool` simultaneously, users should delete the `local_cluster_jobs` folder when no job is actively running.
